```python
import * as ELASTICSEARCH from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-elasticsearch';
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.Instance.attr_domain
documentation: Attribute Domain: Instance connection domain (only VPC network access supported).

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.Instance.attr_instance_charge_type
documentation: Attribute InstanceChargeType: Instance charge type.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.Instance.attr_instance_id
documentation: Attribute InstanceId: The ID of the Elasticsearch instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.Instance.attr_kibana_domain
documentation: Attribute KibanaDomain: Kibana console domain (Internet access supported).

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.Instance.attr_kibana_port
documentation: Attribute KibanaPort: Kibana console port.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.Instance.attr_port
documentation: Attribute Port:  Instance connection port.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.Instance.attr_public_domain
documentation: Attribute PublicDomain: Instance public connection domain.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.Instance.attr_status
documentation:
Attribute Status: The Elasticsearch instance status.

Includes active, activating, inactive. Some operations are denied when status is not active.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.Instance.attr_version
documentation: Attribute Version: Elasticsearch version.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.Instance.attr_v_switch_id
documentation: Attribute VSwitchId: The ID of VSwitch.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::ElasticSearch::Instance`.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosInstance\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-elasticsearch-instance>

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.InstanceProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Instance`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-elasticsearch-instance>

```
param data_node

Property dataNode: The Elasticsearch cluster's data node setting.

param password

Property password: The password of the instance. The password can be 8 to 32 characters in length and must contain three of the following conditions: uppercase letters, lowercase letters, numbers, and special characters (!@#$%&*()_+-=).

param version

Property version: Elasticsearch version. Supported values: 5.5.3_with_X-Pack, 6.3_with_X-Pack, 6.7_with_X-Pack, 7.4_with_X-Pack, 6.8, 7.4, 7.7 and so on.

param v_switch_id

Property vSwitchId: The ID of VSwitch.

param description

Property description: The description of instance. It a string of 0 to 30 characters. It can contain numbers, letters, underscores, (_) and hyphens (-). It must start with a letter, a number or Chinese character.

param enable_kibana_private

Property enableKibanaPrivate: Enables or disables intranet access to Kibana.

param enable_kibana_public

Property enableKibanaPublic: Enables or disables Internet access to Kibana.

param enable_public

Property enablePublic: Whether enable public access. If properties is true, will allocate public address.Default: false.

param instance_category

Property instanceCategory: Version Type: - x-pack: Create a commercial instance or a kernel-enhanced instance without Indexing Service and OpenStore enabled. - IS: Creates a kernel-enhanced instance with Indexing Service or OpenStore enabled

param instance_charge_type

Property instanceChargeType: Valid values are PrePaid, PostPaid, Default to PostPaid.

param kibana_node

Property kibanaNode: The dedicated kibana node setting.

param kibana_whitelist

Property kibanaWhitelist: Set the Kibana's IP whitelist in internet network.

param master_node

Property masterNode: The dedicated master node setting. If specified, dedicated master node will be created.

param period

Property period: The duration that you will buy Elasticsearch instance. It is valid when instance_charge_type is PrePaid. Unit is Month, it could be from 1 to 9 or 12, 24, 36, 48, 60. Unit is Year, it could be from 1 to 3. Default value is 1.

param period_unit

Property periodUnit: Unit of prepaid time period, it could be Month/Year. Default value is Month.

param private_whitelist

Property privateWhitelist: Set the instance's IP whitelist in VPC network.

param public_whitelist

Property publicWhitelist: Set the instance's IP whitelist in Internet. The AllocatePublicAddress should be true.

param resource_group_id

Property resourceGroupId: The ID of the resource group.

param tags

Property tags: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

param yml_config

Property ymlConfig: In the YML Configuration section of the Cluster Configuration page of your Alibaba Cloud Elasticsearch cluster, you can enable the Auto Indexing, Audit Log Indexing, or Watcher feature.

param zone_count

Property zoneCount: undefined.

param zone_id

Property zoneId: The zone id of elasticsearch.
```

documentation: Property dataNode: The Elasticsearch cluster's data node setting.

It a string of 0 to 30 characters. It can contain numbers, letters, underscores, (_) and hyphens (-). It must start with a letter, a number or Chinese character.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.InstanceProps.enable_kibana_private
documentation: Property enableKibanaPrivate: Enables or disables intranet access to Kibana.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.InstanceProps.enable_kibana_public
documentation: Property enableKibanaPublic: Enables or disables Internet access to Kibana.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.InstanceProps.enable_public
documentation:
Property enablePublic: Whether enable public access.

If properties is true, will allocate public address.Default: false.

documentation:
Property instanceCategory: Version Type: - x-pack: Create a commercial instance or a kernel-enhanced instance without Indexing Service and OpenStore enabled.

- IS: Creates a kernel-enhanced instance with Indexing Service or OpenStore enabled

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.InstanceProps.instance_charge_type
documentation: Property instanceChargeType: Valid values are PrePaid, PostPaid, Default to PostPaid.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.InstanceProps.kibana_node
documentation: Property kibanaNode: The dedicated kibana node setting.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.InstanceProps.kibana_whitelist
documentation: Property kibanaWhitelist: Set the Kibana's IP whitelist in internet network.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.InstanceProps.master_node
documentation:
Property masterNode: The dedicated master node setting.

If specified, dedicated master node will be created.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.InstanceProps.period
documentation:
Property period: The duration that you will buy Elasticsearch instance.

It is valid when instance_charge_type is PrePaid. Unit is Month, it could be from 1 to 9 or 12, 24, 36, 48, 60. Unit is Year, it could be from 1 to 3. Default value is 1.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.InstanceProps.period_unit
documentation:
Property periodUnit: Unit of prepaid time period, it could be Month/Year.

Default value is Month.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.InstanceProps.private_whitelist
documentation: Property privateWhitelist: Set the instance's IP whitelist in VPC network.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.InstanceProps.public_whitelist
documentation:
Property publicWhitelist: Set the instance's IP whitelist in Internet.

The AllocatePublicAddress should be true.

documentation: Property resourceGroupId: The ID of the resource group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.InstanceProps.tags
documentation:
Property tags: Tags to attach to instance.

Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

documentation: Property ymlConfig: In the YML Configuration section of the Cluster  Configuration page of your Alibaba Cloud Elasticsearch cluster,  you can enable the Auto Indexing, Audit Log Indexing, or Watcher feature.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstance.DataNodeProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param amount: true
param disk_encryption: true
param disk_size: true
param disk_type: true
param performance_level: true
param spec: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstance.DataNodeProperty.amount
documentation: :Property: amount: The Elasticsearch cluster's data node quantity, between 2 and 50.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstance.DataNodeProperty.disk_size
documentation:
:Property:

diskSize: The single data node storage space.
cloud_ssd: An SSD disk, supports a maximum of 2048 GiB (2 TB).
cloud_efficiency: An ultra disk, supports a maximum of 5120 GiB (5 TB). If the data to be stored is larger than 2048 GiB, an ultra disk can only support the following data sizes (GiB): [2560, 3072, 3584, 4096, 4608, 5120].

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstance.DataNodeProperty.disk_type
documentation: :Property: diskType: The data node disk type. Supported values: cloud_ssd, cloud_efficiency, cloud_essd

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstance.DataNodeProperty.spec
documentation: :Property: spec: The data node specifications of the Elasticsearch instance.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstance.DataNodeProperty.disk_encryption
documentation: :Property: diskEncryption: Whether to enable cloud disk encryption.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstance.DataNodeProperty.performance_level
documentation:
:Property:

performanceLevel: The performance level of the ESSD. When the storage type is cloud_essd,
this parameter is required and supports PL1, PL2, and PL3.

param audit_log: true
param create_index: true
param destructive_requires_name: true
param other_configs: true
param watcher: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstance.YMLConfigProperty.audit_log
documentation:
:Property:

auditLog: If you enable Audit Log Indexing, the system generates audit logs
for the create, delete, modify, and search operations that are performed
in the Elasticsearch cluster. These logs consume disk space and affect
cluster performance. Therefore, we recommend that you disable Audit Log
Indexing and exercise caution when you configure this parameter.
This parameter is unavailable for Elasticsearch clusters of V7.0 or later.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstance.YMLConfigProperty.create_index
documentation:
:Property:

createIndex: Specifies whether to automatically create an index when a new document
is uploaded to your Elasticsearch cluster but no index exists.
We recommend that you disable Auto Indexing because indexes created
by this feature may not meet your business requirements.
This parameter corresponds to the action.auto_create_index configuration
item in the YML file. The default value of this configuration item is false.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstance.YMLConfigProperty.destructive_requires_name
documentation:
:Property:

destructiveRequiresName: Specifies whether to specify the index name when you delete an index.
If you set this parameter to Allow Wildcards, you can use wildcards to
delete multiple indexes at a time. Deleted indexes cannot be recovered.
Exercise caution when you configure this parameter.
This parameter corresponds to the action.destructive_requires_name configuration
item in the YML file. The default value of this configuration item is true.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstance.YMLConfigProperty.other_configs
documentation: :Property: otherConfigs: Other Configurations.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstance.YMLConfigProperty.watcher
documentation:
:Property:

watcher: If you enable Watcher, you can use the X-Pack Watcher feature.
You must clear the .watcher-history* index on a regular basis to free up disk space.
This parameter corresponds to the xpack.watcher.enabled configuration item in the YML file.
The default value of this configuration item is false.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::ElasticSearch::Instance`.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Instance` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-elasticsearch-instance>

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstanceProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `RosInstance`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-elasticsearch-instance>


methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstanceProps.data_node
documentation: :Property: dataNode: The Elasticsearch cluster's data node setting.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstanceProps.password
documentation:
:: #$%&*()_+-=).
:Property: password: The password of the instance. The password can be 8 to 32 characters in length and must contain three of the following conditions: uppercase letters, lowercase letters, numbers, and special characters (!

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstanceProps.version
documentation: :Property: version: Elasticsearch version. Supported values: 5.5.3_with_X-Pack, 6.3_with_X-Pack, 6.7_with_X-Pack, 7.4_with_X-Pack, 6.8, 7.4, 7.7 and so on.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstanceProps.v_switch_id
documentation: :Property: vSwitchId: The ID of VSwitch.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstanceProps.description
documentation: :Property: description: The description of instance. It a string of 0 to 30 characters. It can contain numbers, letters, underscores, (_) and hyphens (-). It must start with a letter, a number or Chinese character.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstanceProps.enable_kibana_private
documentation: :Property: enableKibanaPrivate: Enables or disables intranet access to Kibana.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstanceProps.enable_kibana_public
documentation: :Property: enableKibanaPublic: Enables or disables Internet access to Kibana.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstanceProps.enable_public
documentation: :Property: enablePublic: Whether enable public access. If properties is true, will allocate public address.Default: false.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstanceProps.instance_category
documentation:
:Property:

instanceCategory: Version Type:

- x-pack: Create a commercial instance or a kernel-enhanced instance without Indexing Service and OpenStore enabled.
- IS: Creates a kernel-enhanced instance with Indexing Service or OpenStore enabled

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstanceProps.instance_charge_type
documentation: :Property: instanceChargeType: Valid values are PrePaid, PostPaid, Default to PostPaid.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstanceProps.kibana_node
documentation: :Property: kibanaNode: The dedicated kibana node setting.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstanceProps.kibana_whitelist
documentation: :Property: kibanaWhitelist: Set the Kibana's IP whitelist in internet network.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstanceProps.master_node
documentation: :Property: masterNode: The dedicated master node setting. If specified, dedicated master node will be created.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstanceProps.period
documentation: :Property: period: The duration that you will buy Elasticsearch instance. It is valid when instance_charge_type is PrePaid. Unit is Month, it could be from 1 to 9 or 12, 24, 36, 48, 60. Unit is Year, it could be from 1 to 3. Default value is 1.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstanceProps.period_unit
documentation: :Property: periodUnit: Unit of prepaid time period, it could be Month/Year. Default value is Month.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstanceProps.private_whitelist
documentation: :Property: privateWhitelist: Set the instance's IP whitelist in VPC network.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstanceProps.public_whitelist
documentation: :Property: publicWhitelist: Set the instance's IP whitelist in Internet. The AllocatePublicAddress should be true.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstanceProps.resource_group_id
documentation: :Property: resourceGroupId: The ID of the resource group.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstanceProps.tags
documentation: :Property: tags: Tags to attach to instance. Max support 20 tags to add during create instance. Each tag with two properties Key and Value, and Key is required.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstanceProps.yml_config
documentation:
:Property:

ymlConfig: In the YML Configuration section of the Cluster
Configuration page of your Alibaba Cloud Elasticsearch cluster,
you can enable the Auto Indexing, Audit Log Indexing, or Watcher feature.

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstanceProps.zone_count
documentation: :Property: zoneCount: undefined

methods.name: ros_cdk_elasticsearch.RosInstanceProps.zone_id
documentation: :Property: zoneId: The zone id of elasticsearch.
